title: Login and Navigate to Program Builder
description: Verifies trainer can log in and access the Program Builder page

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000
Type "{{LOGIN_USER}}" into the email field
Type "{{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}" into the password field
Click the Login button
Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Verify URL contains '/trainer/programs'
Verify program list or empty state is visible

title: Create New Program Template
description: Verifies trainer can create a new program template

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click button with text containing 'Create' or 'New Program' or plus icon
Wait for modal or dialog to appear
Type 'TestSprite Test Program' into program name field
Type 'Auto-generated test program' into description field
Click submit or create button
Verify success message or program appears in list

title: View Program Details
description: Verifies trainer can view the details of an existing program

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click on first program card or list item
Verify program name is displayed
Verify week and day structure is visible

title: Add Section to Program Day
description: Verifies trainer can add a section (warmup, main, cooldown) to a program day

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click on first program to view details
Click button to add section (look for 'Add Section' or plus icon near a day)
Wait for section creation modal or dialog
Select section type if dropdown exists (warmup, main, skill, cooldown, custom)
Type 'Test Warmup Section' into section name field
Click save or create button
Verify section appears in the program day

title: Add Exercise to Section
description: Verifies trainer can add an exercise to a section with tracking fields

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click on first program to view details
Expand a section if needed
Click button to add exercise to section
Wait for exercise picker dialog or modal
Select first available exercise from list
Wait for exercise configuration form
Configure sets/reps or other tracking fields if form is visible
Click save or add button
Verify exercise appears in the section

title: Edit Program Details
description: Verifies trainer can edit program name and description

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click on first program card
Click edit button or menu option (look for Edit icon or dropdown)
Wait for edit modal to appear
Clear and type 'Updated Program Name' into name field
Clear and type 'Updated description' into description field
Click save or update button
Verify program name shows 'Updated Program Name'

title: Clone Program
description: Verifies trainer can clone an existing program

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click on first program card
Click clone/copy button or find it in dropdown menu
Wait for cloning process to complete
Navigate back to programs list
Verify cloned program appears with '(Copy)' or similar suffix

title: Delete Program
description: Verifies trainer can delete a program with confirmation

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Create a test program to delete
Click delete button or find it in dropdown menu
Wait for confirmation dialog
Click confirm delete button
Verify program is removed from list

title: Add New Week to Program
description: Verifies trainer can add additional weeks to a program

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Click on first program to view details
Click button to add new week (look for 'Add Week' or similar)
Wait for new week to be created
Verify second week appears in the program structure
Verify week selector or tabs show multiple weeks

title: Search and Filter Programs
description: Verifies trainer can search for programs by name

steps.description: Navigate to http://localhost:3000/trainer/programs
Locate search input field
Type program name into search field
Wait for filtered results
Verify only matching programs are displayed
Clear search field
Verify all programs are shown again
